projects.title: myPAL - Philippine Airlines
projects.description: The flagship mobile application for Philippine Airlines, transforming the digital travel experience for global passengers. Features seamless flight booking, real-time check-in with digital boarding passes, comprehensive flight status tracking, and deep integration with the Mabuhay Miles loyalty program. Engineered for scalability and high availability.
projects.techStack: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture, Coroutines, Retrofit, Room, Biometric Auth

projects.title: Maya (Paymaya) SDK
projects.description: A secure, modular Payment SDK enabling third-party merchants to accept in-app payments seamlessly. Supports credit/debit cards, PayMaya wallet, and QR payments. Features a customizable UI kit, bank-grade encryption, and strict PCI-DSS compliance, empowering hundreds of partner apps to monetize effectively.
projects.techStack: Kotlin, Payment Security, PCI-DSS, Encryption, SDK Design, API Integration

projects.title: CIVIL SERVICE REVIEWER
projects.description: Civil Service Exam Reviewer is a comprehensive review app designed to help aspiring candidates prepare effectively for the Civil Service Exam (CSE). Covering both Sub-Professional and Professional levels, the app features a regularly updated question database, realistic practice tests, instant performance feedback, detailed analytics, and a helpful registration guide. With its user-friendly interface and expertly crafted review materials, it enables users to strengthen key areas, improve test-taking skills, and build confidence—making it a reliable companion for achieving success in the Civil Service Exam.
projects.techStack: Kotlin, Firebase, Room, Jetpack Compose, Google Ads, In-App Purchases

projects.title: Ultimate LTO Exam Reviewer
projects.description: Ultimate LTO Exam Reviewer is a comprehensive review app designed to help aspiring candidates prepare effectively for the Land Transportation Office (LTO) Exam. Covering both theoretical and practical driving knowledge, the app features a regularly updated question database, realistic practice tests, instant performance feedback, detailed analytics, and helpful resources for license application and renewal. With its user-friendly interface and expertly crafted review materials, it enables users to strengthen key areas, improve test-taking skills, and build confidence—making it a reliable companion for achieving success in the LTO Exam.
projects.techStack: Kotlin, Firebase, Room, Jetpack Compose, Google Ads, In-App Purchases

projects.title: Chikka
projects.description: The pioneering cross-platform messenger that successfully bridged web and SMS. Allowed users to send free text messages to any mobile number from the app. Features included real-time group chat, message synchronization across devices, and an optimized protocol for handling communications in low-bandwidth network conditions.
projects.techStack: Android, XMPP, WebSockets, Real-time Sync, SQLite, Push Notifications

projects.title: BGE by Exelon
projects.description: Free mobile self-service hub for BGE (Exelon) customers to manage energy accounts, pay bills, track usage, report outages, and view restoration maps. Features AutoPay management, PeakRewards device control, and customizable alerts for seamless energy management on the go.
projects.techStack: Android, Account Management, Payment Integration, Real-time Maps, Push Notifications

projects.title: ComEd by Exelon
projects.description: Free utility management app for ComEd (Exelon) customers in Northern Illinois. Manage accounts, pay bills, report and track outages with real-time maps, and monitor hourly energy usage. Features biometric sign-in, Budget Billing settings, bill forecasts, and customizable usage alerts for convenient on-the-go access.
projects.techStack: Android, Biometric Authentication, Real-time Data, Payment Integration, Usage Analytics

projects.title: PECO by Exelon
projects.description: Free secure mobile hub for PECO (Exelon) electric and natural gas customers. Manage accounts, pay bills, report and track outages with real-time maps, and monitor energy consumption. Features biometric sign-in, AutoPay and Budget Billing settings, multi-account management, and Apple Watch compatibility for seamless utility service access.
projects.techStack: Android, iOS, Biometric Security, Apple Watch, Real-time Maps, Multi-Account Support

projects.title: mystc
projects.description: Comprehensive telecom super-app for stc customers in Saudi Arabia. Manage all services, order new numbers with delivery, shop smart devices and vouchers, transfer numbers from other operators, pay bills, recharge prepaid, manage packages, subscribe to entertainment services, and get 24/7 instant support. Features number auctions, device exchange, gifting, roaming packages, and carrier billing integration.
projects.techStack: Android, E-commerce, Payment Gateway, Live Chat, Carrier Billing, Multi-Service Platform

projects.title: Clinic Management System
projects.description: A Clinic Management System (CMS) is a system designed to efficiently manage and streamline the daily operations of a clinic. It facilitates patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical record management, prescription handling, and basic administrative tasks. The system enhances operational efficiency, minimizes manual paperwork, ensures accurate and secure record-keeping, and improves the overall quality of patient care and service delivery.
projects.techStack: JavaScript, PHP, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, MySQL, Appointment Scheduling

projects.title: MLBB Game Guide
projects.description: MLBB Game Guide is a comprehensive companion app designed to help players improve their gameplay and strategy in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. It provides detailed hero information, item builds, emblems, battle spells, rankings, tier lists, and drafting strategies—all in one convenient platform. With organized and easy-to-navigate data, users can explore hero stats and roles, compare items, learn optimal emblem and spell usage, track the current meta, and even simulate team drafts to practice compositions and counters. Regularly updated for accuracy and relevance, the app offers a simple, user-friendly experience for players of all skill levels.
projects.techStack: Interactive UI, Lottie Animations, API Integration, Social Features, Real-time Stats

projects.title: Bed Bath & Beyond
projects.description: Streamlined home goods shopping app for furniture and decor. Features app-exclusive deals and discounts, wish list bookmarking with social sharing, instant price drop alerts, centralized coupon storage, quick checkout with saved credentials, and comprehensive order tracking. Shop thousands of products for every room, every home, and every budget.
projects.techStack: Android, E-commerce, Price Alerts, Wish Lists, Order Tracking, Coupon Management

projects.title: Laundry Management System
projects.description: A Laundry Management System (LMS) is a digital system used to manage laundry shop operations efficiently. It tracks customer orders, service types, pricing, pickup and delivery, payment transactions, and order status. The system helps organize workflow, reduce errors, monitor income, and improve customer service by providing accurate and real-time updates.
projects.techStack: Typescript, Laravel, React, Tailwind CSS, MySQL, Appointment Scheduling

projects.title: Play To Learn: Periodic Table
projects.description: Play To Learn: Periodic Table is an engaging educational app designed to make learning chemistry interactive, enjoyable, and easy to understand. Featuring a fully interactive periodic table, users can tap on each element to explore detailed information such as atomic number, symbol, atomic weight, electron configuration, properties, history, uses, and orbital diagrams. The app also includes 3D atomic structure visualization to better understand electron arrangements, along with fun and educational quizzes to reinforce learning. With its intuitive interface and visually appealing design, it’s perfect for students, educators, and science enthusiasts who want to study at their own pace. This initial release marks the beginning of more exciting updates and features to come, making it a growing companion for anyone eager to explore the wonders of chemistry.
projects.techStack: Kotlin, Maps SDK, QR Scanning, Payment Gateway, Real-time Tracking, Firebase

projects.title: CPU Scheduling Solver
projects.description:
The main function of this app is solving and graphing different CPU Scheduling algorithms. The values plot in a bar graph and it gives you the algorithm that computes the average waiting and turnaround time. CPU scheduling is a process which allows one process to use the CPU while the execution of another process is on hold (in waiting state) due to unavailability of any resource like I/O etc, thereby making full use of CPU. The aim of CPU scheduling is to make the system efficient, fast and fair.

Features:
  • 6 CPU Scheduling algorithms (FCFS, SRF, SPF, Round Robin, Priority Preemptive/Non-preemptive)
  • Sample value generation
  • Interactive bar graphs and computation results
  • Offline functionality
projects.techStack: Java/Kotlin, Android SDK, Graphing Library, Algorithms, UI/UX Design
